_schema_documentation.description: Registry of shadow strategies for A/B testing against the live (champion) strategy. Each entry has the keys below. Set 'active': false to keep an entry as documentation without running it.

fields.active: boolean. If false, the shadow is documented but not evaluated.
fields.type: Implementation type. Must be a key in SHADOW_IMPLEMENTATIONS. Currently: 'hold_through_rerank'.
fields.description: Free-text description of what the shadow is testing.
fields.active_since: YYYY-MM-DD. Only weeks on or after this date are evaluated. Lets you start tracking a hypothesis from a specific cut date.
fields.params: Type-specific parameter overrides (see comments per type).
fields.promotion_criteria: Free-text reference to the pre-registered markdown doc with the promote/retire decision criteria. Required reading before promoting.

hold_through_rerank.behavior: Each week N's top-N picks: hold through weeks N+1, N+2,... as long as the name still ranks in the top-N. Exit at the close of the week it drops out.

params.max_extension_weeks: int. Cap on additional hold weeks beyond entry week. Default 4.

shadow_hold_through_rerank_v1.description: Hold positions through future weeks if they re-rank in top-10 (composite). Tests whether the cadence_analyzer's early signal of 'multi-week capture > 1-week capture' translates to operational gains.
